concerns.text: FR-007 requires a Friedman test to assess differences in pass rates across prompt token conditions. Friedman’s test assumes ordinal/ranked data and is not appropriate for binary outcomes (pass@1). A more suitable test for paired binary data would be Cochran’s Q test or a generalized linear mixed‑effects model with a categorical predictor. Moreover, Constitution Principle VII mandates repeated‑measures ANOVA for within‑model comparisons, which also conflicts with the use of Friedman’s test. This methodological mismatch violates the project constitution and may yield invalid significance conclusions.
